Primary Corpus

The texts that constitute the PhD curriculum — no translations of translations, no summaries

Works in Corpus

Meditations

Books I–XII

Private philosophical journal of the emperor. Written in Greek. Never intended for publication.

Full text retrieval available during seminars via RAG. The Socratic Proctor and Archivist draw from this corpus when relevant passages are required.
